headerDisplay: This plugin exposes a REST API so that [OpenClaw](https://docs.openclaw.ai) agents can list and control your HomeKit devices via Homebridge.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for this platform in Homebridge.

apiPort.title: API Port
apiPort.description: Port for the REST API server (1024-65535).

apiBind.title: Bind Address
apiBind.description: Network interface to bind to. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access.

token.title: Bootstrap Token
token.description: Bootstrap token for minting short-lived OpenClaw session tokens. Leave empty to auto-generate.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limit
rateLimit.description: Maximum requests per minute per IP address (1-10000).

sessionTokenTtl.title: Session Token TTL (seconds)
sessionTokenTtl.description: Lifetime of issued API session tokens. Clients exchange the bootstrap token for a short-lived session token before normal API calls.

homebridgeUiUrl.title: Config UI X URL
homebridgeUiUrl.description: URL of Homebridge Config UI X. Only change if running on a non-default port.

homebridgeUiUser.title: Config UI X Username
homebridgeUiUser.description: Only required if automatic credential detection fails (non-Docker setups).

homebridgeUiPass.title: Config UI X Password
homebridgeUiPass.description: Only required if automatic credential detection fails (non-Docker setups).

pollInterval.title: State Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often the plugin checks HomeKit for state changes to populate the event queue (10-300s).

eventSource.title: Event Source Mode
eventSource.description: Choose how state-change events are produced. 'poll' is stable, 'hap' is experimental, and 'hybrid' uses HAP with polling fallback.

hapFallbackPollInterval.title: HAP Fallback Poll Interval (seconds)
hapFallbackPollInterval.description: In hybrid mode, how often to poll as a safety net if HAP notifications are delayed or dropped.

hapSubscribeTypes.title: HAP Subscribe Types
hapSubscribeTypes.description: Experimental HAP subscription categories to listen for when HAP mode is enabled.

eventQueueSize.title: Event Queue Size
eventQueueSize.description: Maximum number of events held in memory. Oldest events are dropped when the queue is full.

pluginExternalUrl.title: Plugin External URL
pluginExternalUrl.description: The URL OpenClaw uses to reach this plugin. Used in the /api/setup bundle. Defaults to http://localhost:<apiPort>.

layout.title: Authentication
layout.description: The bootstrap token is auto-generated if left empty. Clients exchange it for short-lived session tokens. Only fill the UI credentials if auto-detection does not work.
